summary: Completed e2e testing of DOMMMA iteration 28 features: Virtual Staging AI, Real-time Notifications, Analytics Export (CSV/JSON), Enhanced Credit Check with affordability, Google Maps AdvancedMarker migration. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Analytics page with Export button exists at /analytics but is not linked in the sidebar navigation. Users cannot easily access the Export functionality.
WebSocket connections failing with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - reconnection attempts visible. Real-time notifications may not work reliably.

issues: Google Maps loader warnings: '@googlemaps/js-api-loader No options were set before calling importLibrary' - non-critical but should be addressed

action_items: Add Analytics link to sidebar navigation for landlords (currently at /analytics but not accessible from sidebar)
Fix WebSocket connection issues for real-time notifications
critical_code_review_comments: Virtual Staging API correctly returns room_types and styles arrays
Credit Check API now includes score_breakdown and affordability sections as requested
Analytics Export API correctly returns CSV with proper headers and JSON with data structure
Google Maps migration to @vis.gl/react-google-maps AdvancedMarker complete - no deprecated Marker warnings
NotificationCenter component properly integrated in DashboardLayout header

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features working, minor issues with Analytics page access and WebSocket)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users test@dommma.com / test123 and testlandlord@dommma.com / test123
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 testing complete. Key features verified: 1) Virtual Staging API at /api/virtual-staging/styles and /api/virtual-staging/history/{user_id} working, 2) Notifications API at /api/notifications/{user_id} with count and mark-all-read endpoints working, 3) Analytics Export at /api/analytics/export/csv/{user_id} and /api/analytics/export/json/{user_id} working with report_type parameter, 4) Credit Check at /api/credit-check/request returns enhanced report with score_breakdown and affordability sections, 5) Web Push VAPID key at /api/push/vapid-public-key working, 6) Browse page uses @vis.gl/react-google-maps AdvancedMarker (no deprecated Marker warnings), 7) Virtual Staging page at /virtual-staging accessible from landlord sidebar, 8) NotificationCenter bell icon in dashboard header. Note: Analytics page exists at /analytics with Export button but not linked in sidebar.

backend_apis.POST /api/auth/login (landlord): PASS - Login works with testlandlord@dommma.com / test123

backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/export/json/{user_id}: PASS - Returns JSON with data structure
backend_apis.POST /api/credit-check/request: PASS - Returns enhanced report with score_breakdown and affordability

frontend_pages.dashboard_renter: PASS - Shows welcome message, NotificationCenter bell icon in header
frontend_pages.dashboard_landlord: PASS - Shows welcome message, Virtual Staging link in sidebar
frontend_pages.virtual_staging: PASS - Page loads with upload area, room types, and design styles
frontend_pages.credit_check: PASS - Page loads with search tenant form and consent checkbox
frontend_pages.browse: PASS - Loads with AdvancedMarker map, Rent/Buy/Lease Takeover tabs

navigation_constraints.AI Search NOT in top nav: PASS - Only in sidebar as 'Nova Insights'

mocked_apis.virtual_staging: Virtual Staging AI requires EMERGENT_LLM_KEY credits - actual image generation not tested
